zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret St. Loe於1554年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾易亞斯廷頓時，她的父親Edward Saint Loe39歲，母親Margaret Hughes32歲。她於1570年與Richard James Stephens在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾易亞斯廷頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1591年3月4日在她的家鄉享年37歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾易亞斯廷頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret St. Loe于1554年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾易亞斯廷頓时，她的父亲Edward Saint Loe39岁，母亲Margaret Hughes32岁。她于1570年与Richard James Stephens在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾易亞斯廷頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1591年3月4日在她的家乡享年37岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾易亞斯廷頓。

nameMeanings.name: St.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: 1  French: habitational name from any of the places so called, for example in Normandy, named from a religious dedication to a (male) St. Clair.
2  North American variant spelling of   St  .   Claire  .

variants.name: Claire
meanings: Variant of   Clair  , an altered form of German   Klare  .

variants.name: St
meanings: 1  English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of the numerous places in France so called from the dedication of their churches to St. Jean (  see  John  ).
2  Americanized form of French   St  .   Jean  .

nameMeanings.name: Loe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farms named Lo, most of them from Old Norse ló ‘meadow by water’ e.g. a river.
Dutch and North German (Westphalia): variant of   Loo  .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 呂 (mainly found in Indonesia), see   Lu   6.

variants.name: Loo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Sing, Ying, Wing, Ming, Siu, Boon, Bor, Chih-Chung, Chuan, Chun, Dong, Eng.

North German and Dutch: topographic name for someone living near a wood (Dutch loo ‘wood’, Middle Low German lo, loge), or a habitational name from any of the places called Lo or Loh, named with this word.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 盧, 蘆, 魯, 路, 陸 and 呂. See   Lu   1-6.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret St. Loe was born in 1554, in Eastington, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Edward Saint Loe, was 39 and her mother, Margaret Hughes, was 32. She married Richard James Stephens in 1570, in Eastington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 4 March 1591, in her hometown, at the age of 37, and was buried in Eastington, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret St. Loe est née en 1554, à Eastington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Edward Saint Loe, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Margaret Hughes, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Richard James Stephens en 1570, à Eastington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 mars 1591, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Eastington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret St. Loe 1554 in Eastington, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edward Saint Loe 39 und ihre Mutter Margaret Hughes 32. Sie hat 1570 in Eastington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Richard James Stephens geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. März 1591 im Alter von 37 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Eastington, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret St. Loe è nata il nel 1554 nel Eastington, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Edward Saint Loe, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Margaret Hughes, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Richard James Stephens nel 1570, nel Eastington, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 4 marzo 1591, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a Eastington, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret St. Loeが1554年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアエアスティントンで生まれた時，父Edward Saint Loeは39歳，母Margaret Hughesは32歳であった。1570年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアエアスティントンでRichard James Stephensと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1591年3月4日に故郷で37歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアエアスティントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret St. Loe(이)가 1554년 영국 그루스스터실르 이스틴그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Saint Loe(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Hughes(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1570년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 이스틴그턴에서 Richard James Stephens(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1591년 3월 4일 그녀의 고향에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 이스틴그턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret St. Loe nasceu em 1554, em Eastington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edward Saint Loe, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Hughes, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard James Stephens em 1570, em Eastington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de março de 1591, em sua cidade natal, com 37 anos, e foi sepultada em Eastington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret St. Loe родилась в 1554 г. в местности эастингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Edward Saint Loe было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Hughes, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard James Stephens в 1570 г. в местности эастингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 4 марта 1591 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности эастингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret St. Loe nació en 1554, en Eastington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edward Saint Loe, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Margaret Hughes, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Richard James Stephens en 1570, en Eastington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 4 de marzo de 1591, en su pueblo, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultada en Eastington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
